induction_input: The report the editor reviewed improved.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The bill the senator proposed failed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The manuscript the author submitted disappeared.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using center-embedded object relative clauses, following the pattern: "The [noun] the [noun] [past verb] [past verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using center-embedded object relative clauses, following the pattern: "The [noun] the [noun] [past verb] [past verb]."
l2_sentences: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The book the student read vanished.
The car the mechanic fixed crashed.
The letter the secretary typed arrived.
The report the manager approved circulated.
l1_sentences: The report the editor reviewed improved.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The bill the senator proposed failed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The manuscript the author submitted disappeared.
